title: Total compensation
description: Practice calculating total compensation: adding health insurance benefits, calculating retirement benefits as percentage, periodic benefits total, and total compensation given all benefits.

assessment_items.question_content:
Your annual salary is $\$30{,}000$, and your job gives you health insurance that would normally cost $\$12{,}000$ per year.

**What is your total compensation?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Your job pays you a salary of $\$40{,}000$ a year, and gives you health insurance worth $\$3{,}000$ a year. 

**How much is your total compensation?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

You get a job that pays a salary of $\$20{,}000$ a year. Your job also gives you health insurance worth $\$2{,}500$ a year.

**How much is your total compensation?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Your job pays you a yearly salary of $\$50{,}000$ and also contributes an amount to your retirement plan equal to $5\%$ of your salary.

**How much money does your employer give you for your retirement plan each year?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Your job offers a retirement plan where they contribute $4\%$ of your $\$30{,}000$ salary each year. 

**What amount do they put into the retirement plan each year?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Your job pays you a $\$25{,}000$ yearly salary and contributes $3\%$ of that to your retirement plan.

**How much money does your job contribute to your retirement plan each year?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Susie's job pays a $\$500$ bonus every quarter as part of her total compensation.

**What is the total amount of bonus money Susie's employer will pay her in a year?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Your company provides you with a meal allowance of $\$150$ each month.

** How much does this benefit add up to over a year?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Your job gives you a monthly [[☃ definition 1]] of $\$100$. 

**How much is this benefit worth in a year?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

options.definition: money that a company gives to its workers to help pay for their travel to and from work.

assessment_items.question_content:
A job posting lists the following information:

Benefit| Amount per year
:-|-:
Salary| $\$30{,}000$
Health insurance |$\$2{,}000$
Retirement contribution| $\$1{,}500$

**What is the amount of total compensation being offered?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

A job posting lists the following information:

Benefit| Amount per year
:-|-:
Salary| $\$50{,}000$
Paid vacation |$\$5{,}000$
Retirement contribution| $\$2{,}500$

**What is the total compensation?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

A job posting lists the following information:

Benefit| Amount per year
:-|-:
Salary| $\$35{,}000$
Car allowance |$\$1{,}000$
Retirement contribution| $\$1{,}750$

**How much would your total compensation be?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
